section1.heading: Download and complete the spreadsheet template
section1.p1: Download the spreadsheet template or use you own if it follows the same format.
section1.p3: If you are using your own file, ensure your header row includes these exact columns, with the correct spelling:

section3.heading: Upload spreadsheet
section3.p1: Select 'Choose file', browse to your saved spreadsheet and select it.

additionalClaimantSpreadsheetName.invalidFileSize: The file size must be less than 5MB
additionalClaimantSpreadsheetName.invalidFileFormat: The selected file must be an Excel spreadsheet (.xlsx or .xls)
additionalClaimantSpreadsheetName.invalidRowData: The following rows contain invalid data: {{additionalErrorInfo}}.
additionalClaimantSpreadsheetName.backEndError: Backend error occurred while processing the file. Please try again later.
additionalClaimantSpreadsheetName.fileEmpty: The uploaded file is empty. Upload a file with data.
additionalClaimantSpreadsheetName.noDataRows: The uploaded file does not contain any data rows. Please upload a file with data.
additionalClaimantSpreadsheetName.dataRowsExceedsMax: The uploaded file has exceeded the maximum of {{additionalErrorInfo}} rows.
